description: Detail panel (L5/L8 detailPanel slot) framed by the Host UI Kit: DetailPanelShell (frame + breadcrumb, no title prop — header is the last breadcrumb segment), FieldGrid + FieldRow (value as children, no value prop) for columns, indexes and tags. Data is self-fetched by the plugin via its registered useGetBySlug hook (the kit provides no data layer), and the fetch must be project-scoped: the panel composes /api/projects/<id>/database-tables/... from window.__C4S_PROJECT__.id (the host does not prefix data fetches). Token bridge exposes design-system tokens as --c-* CSS vars. No routing (modal/drawer).
name: Database Table Detail Panel
